scenario: PII(901010-1234567) → 보안 정책 경고 차단 검증
warning_text: {"response":"⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.\n\nThis request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected.","status":"blocked"}
notes: Warning text present and complete (보안 정책 + status:blocked). However, blackbox frontend rendered the engine-injected JSON envelope verbatim instead of parsing the 'response' field — user sees raw JSON braces + keys around the warning. Engine intercept fired correctly; client-side render is suboptimal but warning IS visible and recognizable. Worth flagging to dev for frontend formatting consideration.
